description: PullRequestGeneratorGitLab defines connection info specific to GitLab.

api.description: The GitLab API URL to talk to. If blank, uses https://gitlab.com/.

caRef.description: ConfigMap key holding the trusted certificates

insecure.description: Skips validating the SCM provider's TLS certificate - useful for self-signed certificates.; default: false

labels.description: Labels is used to filter the MRs that you want to target

pullRequestState.description: PullRequestState is an additional MRs filter to get only those with a certain state. Default: "" (all states). Valid values: opened, closed, merged, locked".
